rows.name: Tensor Elite Ultralight Sleeping Pad
rows.quote: Short: 7.6 oz (215 g); 20 x 63" x 3". Manufacturer spec table reproduced by Zpacks (NEMO product page is JS-rendered and does not expose per-size weights).

rows.name: Tensor Elite Ultralight Sleeping Pad
rows.quote: Regular: 8.5 oz (240 g); 20 x 72" x 3". Corroborated by NEMO's own copy describing 'an ethereal 240-gram weight' (nemoequipment.com/products/tensor-elite-ultralight-sleeping-pad).

rows.name: Tensor Elite Ultralight Sleeping Pad
rows.quote: Regular-Wide: 10.4 oz (295g); 25" x 72" x 3". Manufacturer spec table reproduced by Zpacks.

rows.name: Iceline Trekking Poles
rows.quote: Strapless: '134 g (4.7 oz) per pole' (poles, no baskets, no hand straps) = 268 g / 9.4 oz per pair. Durston reviews/marketing cite '9.4 oz/pair'; manufacturer product page states the figure per pole.

rows.name: Iceline Trekking Poles
rows.quote: Strap version (separate option on same product): '145 g (5.1 oz) per pole' = 290 g / 10.2 oz per pair.

rows.name: Ultra-Sil Stuff Sack
rows.quote: Large 15L = 1.0 oz (28 g). Previous-generation Ultra-Sil sizing (current S2S line is 1.5/3/5/8/13/20L); 15L spec confirmed across retailers (Ellis-Brigham, REI, Altitude Sports).

rows.name: Ultra-Sil Stuff Sack
rows.quote: Spec table: 'XXS 4'' x 8.5'' 0.4 oz 11g 130 cu in /2.5 Liter'. Previous-generation Ultra-Sil sizing.

rows.name: Titanium NS Pot 0.9L (ECA422)
rows.quote: TITANIUM NS POT 0.9 L, 900ml (with scale), Weight: 140g (4.93oz). (Non-stick/ceramic-coated Ti pot.)

rows.name: Titanium Ti Cup 400FD (EBY265)
rows.quote: Ti Cup 400FD (EBY265), Single Wall Mug with Folding Handle: '2.12oz/60g'. NOTE: the requested 'ECA278' is Evernew's Ti UL Stacking SET (750ml pot + 400ml cup + sack, 180g/6.3oz total), not a standalone 400ml single-wall mug; EBY265 is the standalone single-wall 400ml mug. The other single-wall 400ml standalone is Ti Mug 400 (EBY262) at 2.4oz/67g.

rows.name: Titan Long Spoon
rows.quote: Weight 0.7 oz (0.02 kg). Ultralight titanium long-handled utensil (a.k.a. MSR Titan Spoon).

rows.name: Water Purification Tablets
rows.quote: Manufacturer product is 'Aquatabs 397mg Tablets x100' — 397 mg = 0.397 g is the whole-tablet mass (67 mg active NaDCC; Aquatabs lists tablets by active ingredient: 3.5/8.5/17/33/67/167/500mg). Value recorded in grams since schema units are oz|g|lb|kg (no mg); cited figure is 397 mg per tablet.

rows.name: Clipper L/B NH Compass
rows.quote: Weight: 0.18 oz / 5g (Suunto spec; Suunto's own page is JS-rendered. Corroborated by Litesmith citing manufacturer).

rows.name: Classic SD
rows.quote: Dimensions section lists Weight: 0.8 oz (a.k.a. Swiss Army Mini Classic). Manufacturer page gives oz only; secondary retailers commonly list ~21 g.

rows.name: Ultralight Food Locker
rows.quote: 14 Litre: '199 g (7.0 oz)'. 'The 14L version bag is certified Grizzly Bear Resistant by the Interagency Grizzly Bear Committee (IGBC). Certificate #245493.' (9L = 147 g / 5.3 oz and 20L = 226 g / 8.0 oz are not IGBC-certified.)
